pr.title: BSM (Bounded State Manifold) - A box intersection non-transformer architecture, 1.4242 val BPB

output.summary: BSM mixes tokens by intersecting causal bounding boxes via dilated pooling before SwiGLU blocks, yielding an O(N) non-attention backbone with ternary QAT.
techniques: Bounding-box token mixing via dilated causal max/min pooling
SwiGLU blocks with zero-initialized down projections
Ternary quantization-aware linear layers after 85% of training
